svg.text: Structural self-expansion — the same task, before and after the vocabulary grows
a real train example from the run ledger · first every seed program provably fails, then one admitted operator makes it compute (16s loop)
one of 4 train examples — 3 more, plus 4 longer held-out inputs, must all match exactly
the vocabulary — 20 seed tokens, frozen since Expedition XIV
open slot — nothing may enter without a certified leap

text.tspan: o01 = max of each adjacent pair
· built by search as an IR tree · admitted only for a certified solve

svg.text: the engine searches — every attempt fails
after admission — the same task computes: apply o01 twice

g.text: every seed program to depth 4 was enumerated — 58,023 distinct
behaviours — and none reproduces this task. Certificate ledgered.

svg.text: exact — and the held-out tests match too
witness [o01, o01] ledgered at generation 1 · solved again in 20 of 30 generations · re-executable forever
W[gate][prev][next] — six slices, one per data shape

g.text: + o01 column & row in every slice — floor 1.0 (G1)

svg.text: no seed program can do this — at ANY budget: all programs to depth 4 are enumerated, none reproduces the task (certificate C1)
search built the missing operator as data, admission grew every gate slice — and the proven-impossible task computes, exactly
the twin engine without admission (OPEN_OFF) stays at 0 forever — the floor the proof guarantees
every leap is a ledgered witness {task, program, vocab sha}, re-executed from ledgered IR at report time — never taken on faith
